message.advanced-economics.open_hint: Press N to open Advanced Economics. You can rebind it in Controls.
screen.advanced-economics.title: Advanced Economics
screen.advanced-economics.footer.shop: Buy unlocked items. Find or unlock items before buying them.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.sell: Sell held items, selected resources, or your whole inventory.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.wallet: Send money, pay for teleports, or accept money duels.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.invest: Invest money with a 1% fee. /invest all includes the fee.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.unlocks: Unlocked items become available in the shop.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.quests: Choose a profession and complete daily or profession tasks.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.setting: Turn major economy systems on or off for this server.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.gamble: Gamble held items or money. Losses are risky.
screen.advanced-economics.wallet.help: Send has 5% fee. Teleport costs $1500.00. Duel stakes both players.
screen.advanced-economics.invest.term_he: 7d fixed deposit button uses the amount field.
screen.advanced-economics.gamble.title: Recent Rolls
screen.advanced-economics.gamble.help: Item gamble: 40% win. Money gamble: 45% win, double stake payout.
screen.advanced-economics.error.required: Fill in the required fields first.
screen.advanced-economics.description.sh: Use the list below to buy unlocked items. Locked items must be found once or unlocked with money.
screen.advanced-economics.description.se: Sell prices use your profession bonus. The daily deal gives one item type x2 sell value.
screen.advanced-economics.description.wa: Sending money has a 5% fee. Teleport costs $1500. Duels move both stakes to one random winner.
screen.advanced-economics.description.in: Deposits grow each Minecraft day. Deposit and withdraw fees are 1%. Fixed deposits lock money for a term.
screen.advanced-economics.description.un: This page shows what you can already buy and what still needs unlocking.
screen.advanced-economics.description.qu: Daily quests reset by world day. Profession quests are larger one-time jobs for better income.
screen.advanced-economics.description.se: Use these toggles to keep only the economy features you want in a modpack or server.
screen.advanced-economics.description.ga: Item gamble can double the held stack. Money gamble doubles the stake on a win and loses it on a loss.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.about: Read how the economy systems work and which commands control them.
screen.advanced-economics.footer.credits: Version, developer, license, and publishing information.
screen.advanced-economics.description.ab: A full in-game guide for Advanced Economics commands and mechanics.
screen.advanced-economics.description.cr: Project information for modpacks, launchers, and server owners.
screen.advanced-economics.quest.professi: Current job: %s. Bonus: %s%%. Sell matching resources to grow from 5%% to 25%%. First job is free; changing jobs costs $500.
screen.advanced-economics.about.1: Advanced Economics 3.0 is a world-scoped economy: every world has separate balances, unlocks, jobs, quests, investments, loans, pets, insurance, and history.
screen.advanced-economics.about.2: Shop/Sell: find an item once or unlock it, then buy it. Sell values can be changed by config or datapacks. Buy prices are 4x sell prices.
screen.advanced-economics.about.3: Wallet: send money with a 5% fee, pay $1500 for teleport, and use money duels where both stakes go to a random winner.
screen.advanced-economics.about.4: Investments: normal deposits grow daily. Invest and withdraw fees are 1%. Fixed deposits support 7, 14, and 30 day terms.
screen.advanced-economics.about.5: Professions: first job is free. Matching sales start at 5% bonus and grow to 25%. Changing job costs $500.
screen.advanced-economics.about.6: Quests: daily quests reset by world day. Profession quests are larger one-time turn-ins for bigger income.
screen.advanced-economics.about.7: Gamble/Services: gamble held items or money, buy short potion effects, repair, rename, remove enchantments, and trade XP for money.
screen.advanced-economics.about.8: Commands: use /aehelp in chat for the full command list and explanations.
screen.advanced-economics.credits.6: License: Business Source License 1.1, changes to GPL-3.0-or-later on 2030-01-01.
screen.advanced-economics.credits.7: Modpack friendly: config, datapack prices, world saves, language files, and optional JEI/REI/EMI/Mod Menu metadata.
screen.advanced-economics.credits.8: Icon: image.jpg. Economy data is saved per world in advanced-economics/player-data.json.
